root.description: Private couple memory, timeline, and planning app.
root.title: PhuocAnh

albums.description: Albums grouped from real trip memories.
albums.label: Albums

futureNotes.description: Notes for future versions of yourselves.
futureNotes.label: Future notes

games.description: Playful couple prompts and mini games.
games.label: Games

hero.description: A boutique photo book, a travel journal, and a quiet planning space for two.

login.helper: Use your magic link to continue back into your private couple keepsake space.
login.inviteHint: If this is your second account, ask your partner for an invite link and open <link>accept invite</link>.
login.title: Welcome back

acceptInvite.helper: Accept your partner invite link to join the shared space.
acceptInvite.missingTokenDescription: Missing token. Open the full invite URL.
acceptInvite.title: Join your couple space

onboarding.helper: Set your real couple details step by step. Nothing is saved until you explicitly confirm the final summary.
onboarding.title: Create your couple space

login.emailDescription: Use the email linked to your couple space.

acceptInvite.tokenDescription: Token is prefilled from your partner invite URL.

onboarding.confirmationDescription: I confirm this summary is correct and should be written to our couple space.
onboarding.coupleNameDescription: Use the real name for your shared space.
onboarding.startedDateDescription: This date powers relationship day counts and timeline milestones.
onboarding.timeZoneDescription: Use your real shared timezone for date boundaries.

validation.confirmationRequired: You must confirm before creating the couple space.
validation.coupleNameMax: Couple name must be 120 characters or fewer.
validation.startedDateFuture: Started date cannot be in the future.

wishItem.titlePlaceholder: Try bánh xèo in Hội An…

validation.noteMax: Keep the note to 200 characters or fewer.
validation.titleMax: Keep the title to 120 characters or fewer.
Keep the checklist title to 120 characters or fewer.

validation.textMax: Keep the item to 180 characters or fewer.

locationSearch.noResults: No places found. You can still save the typed place name.
locationSearch.rateLimited: Place search is cooling down. Try again in a moment.
locationSearch.unavailable: Place search is unavailable. You can still save the typed place name.

memory.happenedAtDescription: Use local time for this memory.
memory.mediaSelected: {count, plural, one {# file selected} other {# files selected}}
memory.noteDescription: A short story helps future search and recap.
memory.deleteConfirm: I understand this will delete this memory and its attached media.

validation.noteMax: Keep the note to 800 characters or fewer.

countdown.noteDescription: Optional context for the moment you are counting toward.
countdown.notePlaceholder: Dinner reservation at our favorite place…
countdown.targetDateDescription: This date is saved against your couple timezone and keeps the selected calendar day.

validation.noteMax: Note must be 280 characters or fewer.
validation.titleMax: Title must be 120 characters or fewer.

futureNote.bodyDescription: The body stays unreadable until the unlock date passes.
futureNote.bodyPlaceholder: Write something your future selves should open later…
futureNote.unlockDateDescription: Unlocks at the start of the selected date in your couple timezone.

validation.bodyMax: Note body must be 2000 characters or fewer.
validation.titleMax: Title must be 120 characters or fewer.

dailyQuestion.answerDescription: Once you submit, your answer locks until both partners have answered.
dailyQuestion.answerPlaceholder: Write the answer you want your partner to read once both of you are in…

validation.answerMax: Answer must be 800 characters or fewer.

guessDate.guessedDateDescription: Choose the date you think this memory happened. You cannot change it after submission.

trivia.answerDescription: Choose the saved location that matches today’s memory clue. You cannot change it after submission.

settingsTimezone.description: This shared timezone controls countdown dates, future note unlocks, trip status, and other couple-level day boundaries.
settingsTimezone.label: Couple timezone

trip.endDateDescription: Trips use date-only ranges for now.
trip.locationDescription: Choose a mapped place for this trip when one applies.
trip.noteDescription: Optional context for the plan, mood, or reason behind this trip.
trip.notePlaceholder: Lantern walk, food crawl, and one very slow morning…
trip.startDateDescription: Trips become active on this date.
trip.deleteConfirm: I understand this will delete this trip, its stops, and its trip album.

validation.dateRangeInvalid: End date must be on or after the start date.
validation.noteMax: Trip note must be 2000 characters or fewer.
validation.titleMax: Title must be 120 characters or fewer.

album.addMediaDescription: Only remaining eligible memories appear here. {count, plural, =0 {No items selected yet.} one {# item selected.} other {# items selected.}}
album.descriptionDescription: A short note helps this album read like a real travel chapter.
album.descriptionPlaceholder: Lantern light, slow breakfasts, and one very full camera roll…
album.mediaDescription: Choose the eligible memories that belong in this album. {count, plural, =0 {No items selected yet.} one {# item selected.} other {# items selected.}}
album.mediaNoteFallback: No note was saved for this memory.

validation.descriptionMax: Album note must be 800 characters or fewer.
validation.mediaRequired: Select at least one memory item.
validation.titleMax: Album title must be 120 characters or fewer.

visitedPlace.noteDescription: Optional context for why this stop mattered.
visitedPlace.locationDescription: Search for the mapped place that matches this stop.
visitedPlace.notePlaceholder: Lanterns overhead, two iced coffees, and the kind of quiet we wanted to keep…

validation.noteMax: Place note must be 800 characters or fewer.
validation.titleMax: Place title must be 120 characters or fewer.
validation.visitedOnRange: Choose a date inside this trip window.
validation.visitedOnRequired: Choose the date you visited this place.

visitedPlace.visitedOnDescription: Visited places must stay inside the trip date range.

invite.accepted: Invite accepted. Welcome to your couple space.
invite.alreadyMember: You’re already in this couple space. Share this invite link with your partner so they can join.
invite.coupleFull: This couple space already has two active members.
invite.invalidOrUsed: Invite is invalid or already used.

magicLink.sent: Check your email for the magic link.
magicLink.unreachable: Cannot reach Supabase Auth. Ensure local Supabase is running and reachable at port 54321.

onboarding.coupleExists: A couple space already exists. Use an invite link to join it.

memory.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Max size is 25MB.
memory.missingContent: Add a note or at least one media file.
memory.unsupportedType: Only image and video files are supported.

dailyQuestion.generationFailed: Could not generate today’s question right now.

guessDate.alreadyAnswered: You already submitted today’s date guess.
guessDate.noMemory: Add at least one memory before starting guess the date.

trivia.alreadyAnswered: You already answered today’s trivia round.

actions.unexpectedError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

trip.invalidDateRangeWithStops: Move or remove stops outside the new date range before updating this trip.

errors.genericDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.schemaCommandsDescription: Local migrations are missing. Run these commands, then reload:

header.description: A story ribbon for your recent chapters, with images, notes, and dates that feel like keepsakes instead of rows.
header.quote: Little details become the chapters you keep reopening.
header.title: Latest chapters

timelineEmpty.description: Start your timeline with a note, photo, or short video and it will appear here like a collectible chapter.
timelineEmpty.title: No memories yet

empty.description: Add places, food, or movies that should become your next chapter together.
empty.title: Nothing saved yet

empty.description: Create a shared list for your next trip, dinner, or tiny weekly ritual.
empty.title: No checklist yet

header.description: Keep your couple plans and todos in one place.
header.title: Shared lists

empty.description: Add places, food, or movies you want to try together.
empty.title: No wish items yet

empty.description: Create a checklist for your next trip or weekend.
empty.title: No checklists yet

header.description: A ceremonial little recap surface for the same date across earlier years.
header.quote: Open the sealed keepsakes from this date and let the day fold back in.
header.title: On this day

stackedReveal.chapterCount: {count, plural, =0 {No chapters} one {# chapter} other {# chapters}}
stackedReveal.title: Sealed keepsakes

empty.description: When this date has memories, they will appear like opened keepsakes here.
empty.title: No memories for today yet

header.description: Save a moment with note, photo, or short video.
header.title: Add memory

story.empty: No note was added for this chapter yet.
story.label: Story note

media.label: Attached media
media.loadErrorDescription: Signed URL is unavailable for this media.
media.noneDescription: No image or video was attached to this memory.
media.title: Visual keepsakes

header.description: A real atlas of the places you have already pinned inside your trip chapters.
header.quote: Routes should feel remembered, not engineered.
header.title: Places map

empty.description: Save your first visited place from a trip detail page and the atlas will start filling with real stops.
empty.title: No visited places yet

header.description: Create, revisit, and organize real trip chapters with linked albums and visited places.
header.title: Trips

composer.description: Start with the trip record, then add visited places and group eligible memories into one album.
composer.title: Start a real trip record

sections.activeDescription: Trips whose date range includes today.
sections.completedDescription: Finished trips stay here as travel history that now anchors albums and saved places.
sections.plannedDescription: Trips that are booked, imagined, or almost ready.

empty.description: Create your first trip to turn this travel section into real couple data.
empty.title: No trips yet

deferred.description: Trips, albums, and mapped places now use saved location data on the map.
deferred.title: Mapped travel data is live

tripDetail.noteEmpty: No note was added for this trip yet.
tripDetail.albumLinkedTitle: This trip already has an album
tripDetail.albumLinkedDescription: Open the album or keep adding remaining eligible memories from this trip window.
tripDetail.albumAddDescription: Only eligible memories not already grouped into this album appear here.
tripDetail.albumGroupedDescription: This trip's current memory set is already attached to the album.
tripDetail.albumComposerDescription: This trip already has eligible memories. Group them into one album now; uploads still stay in the memory flow.
tripDetail.albumEmptyDescription: Add memories whose happened-at date falls inside this trip window, then create the album from here.
tripDetail.mediaComposerDescription: Save images or videos as memories dated inside this trip window. They become eligible for the trip album automatically.
tripDetail.placesComposerDescription: Add the stops you actually visited during this trip. Each saved place appears here and in the shared atlas.
tripDetail.placesDescription: This trip can now hold the places you visited, not just the date range and album.
tripDetail.placesEmptyDescription: Save the first stop from this trip and it will appear here in order.
tripDetail.placesListDescription: Stops stay ordered by the day you visited them inside this trip window.
tripDetail.placesNoteFallback: No place note was added yet.
tripDetail.placesTitle: Map this trip with real places

albumDetail.mediaDescription: This album reuses memory media already saved inside the trip window.
albumDetail.mediaUnavailableDescription: The signed URL for this media is unavailable.
albumDetail.mediaNoteFallback: No note was saved for this memory.

empty.description: This album does not have any visible media items yet.
empty.title: No album media yet

albumDetail.deferredDescription: Visited places are live now. Coordinates, routes, and provider-backed geographic layers still sit downstream of the current travel contract.

automationNote.description: These countdowns now follow the saved couple timezone and trigger one email reminder on the day itself for both partners.
automationNote.title: Reminder automation is live

composer.description: Create real date-based milestones for birthdays, anniversaries, trips, and quiet little plans. The timeline below is backed by the new Phase 2 schema.
composer.title: Add a countdown

past.description: Passed dates will stay here once a milestone is behind you.
past.title: No passed countdowns yet

upcoming.description: Create the first birthday, anniversary, trip, or custom plan you want to track together.
upcoming.title: No upcoming countdowns yet

header.description: Track real couple milestones with date-backed countdowns instead of static sample widgets.
header.title: Countdowns

sections.pastDescription: Finished dates stay visible as a calm archive of what already happened.
sections.upcomingDescription: The closest future milestone always stays first.

composer.description: Write the note now, store the body in the secure content table, and let the database unlock it automatically on the chosen date.
composer.title: Create a future note

locked.description: Sealed notes will appear here until their unlock date passes.
locked.title: No locked notes

unlocked.description: Unlocked note bodies will show here as soon as their date is reached.
unlocked.title: No unlocked notes yet

header.description: Future notes are now real: metadata is visible immediately, while note bodies stay unreadable until unlock.
header.title: Future notes

sections.lockedDescription: Titles and unlock dates stay visible, but bodies remain unreadable until the database policy opens them.
sections.unlockedDescription: Once the unlock date passes, the body becomes readable from the protected content table.

securityNote.description: Note bodies stay in a protected content table, are encrypted at rest, and only unlock inside the app once the saved couple-time date is reached. Unlock emails stay summary-only.
securityNote.title: Protected note bodies and live unlock delivery

header.description: Start today’s question, see what is still waiting, and keep the couple streak moving.
header.title: Games

dailyQuestion.description: One shared prompt per couple and local day. Each partner answers once, then both answers open together.
dailyQuestion.emptySummary: No prompt exists for today yet. Generate the round when you’re ready to start.
dailyQuestion.generateHint: The first partner who opens today’s round sets the stored prompt language for that day.
dailyQuestion.readySummary: {count, plural, =0 {Today’s prompt is ready and waiting for both answers.} one {One answer is in for today’s round.} other {Both answer slots are active for today’s round.}}
dailyQuestion.title: Daily question

guessDate.clueSource: The clue comes from one saved couple memory. The actual date stays hidden until reveal.
guessDate.description: Guess which date a saved memory happened. Each partner submits once, then the memory date opens.
guessDate.emptySummary: No guess-date round exists for today yet. Open the round to pick one saved memory.
guessDate.generateHint: The oldest unused memory is selected first, with oldest-memory fallback after all have appeared.
guessDate.liveNote: Guess the date is backend-backed in this slice.
guessDate.readySummary: {count, plural, =0 {Today’s memory clue is ready and waiting for both guesses.} one {One date guess is locked for today.} other {Both date guesses are locked for today.}}
guessDate.title: Guess the date

trivia.clueSource: The clue comes from one saved memory. The correct location stays hidden until reveal.
trivia.description: Guess which saved location belongs to a memory clue. Each partner chooses once, then correctness opens.
trivia.emptySummary: No trivia round exists for today yet. Start from saved memories with locations.
trivia.generateHint: Trivia needs at least two distinct saved memory locations for fair answer choices.
trivia.liveNote: Trivia is backend-backed in this slice.
trivia.readySummary: {count, plural, =0 {Today’s trivia clue is ready and waiting for both answers.} one {One trivia answer is locked for today.} other {Both trivia answers are locked for today.}}
trivia.title: Who remembers better?

statsBridge.description: The stats view now reflects real gameplay history from daily-question rounds instead of placeholder widgets.
statsBridge.title: Gameplay stats are live

header.description: Mode-specific game view structure is ready for prompt and answer flows.

gameMode.placeholder: This route is a structured shell for the selected game mode. Prompt generation, answer capture, and streak updates will connect here in a later phase.

comingSoon.description: This mode still stays shell-only while daily question, guess the date, and trivia own the current live gameplay contracts.
comingSoon.title: Gameplay wiring

header.description: Generate one question for today, submit one locked answer each, and reveal both once the pair is complete.
header.title: Daily question

intro.description: Today’s round does not exist yet. Generate one shared question when either partner is ready to start.
intro.title: Open the round

round.answerCount: {count, plural, =0 {No answers yet} one {1 answer locked} other {# answers locked}}
round.description: This question is saved once for today and reused for both partners.
round.title: Today’s question

composer.description: Reply once. Editing is not available after submission in this first slice.
composer.title: Submit your answer

pending.title: Waiting for the second answer
pending.viewerLocked: Your answer is locked. Both answers stay hidden until your partner submits their side of today’s round.

reveal.description: Both answers are now open for this round.
reveal.title: Today’s answers

copy.completed: Today’s round is complete and both answers are visible.
copy.not_started: No answers are in yet. Generate the question when you want to begin.
copy.waiting_for_partner: Your answer is in. The round will reveal as soon as your partner answers.
copy.waiting_for_you: Your partner already answered. Submit your side to reveal both.

header.description: Open one memory clue for today, submit one locked date guess each, and reveal the actual memory date once both partners are in.
header.title: Guess the date

intro.description: Today’s date-guess round does not exist yet. Start it from an existing couple memory.
intro.title: Open the round

round.answerCount: {count, plural, =0 {No guesses yet} one {1 guess locked} other {# guesses locked}}
round.description: This clue is sourced from one saved memory. Its actual date stays hidden for now.
round.title: Which date was this?

composer.description: Pick one date. Editing is not available after submission in this slice.
composer.title: Submit your date guess

pending.title: Waiting for the second guess
pending.viewerLocked: Your date guess is locked. The actual memory date and both guesses stay hidden until your partner submits.

reveal.description: The memory happened on {date}. Both date guesses are now open.
reveal.title: Actual memory date

copy.completed: Today’s guess-date round is complete and the memory date is visible.
copy.not_started: No round is open yet. Start from a saved memory when you want to begin.
copy.waiting_for_partner: Your guess is in. The reveal opens as soon as your partner guesses.
copy.waiting_for_you: Your partner already guessed. Submit your date to reveal the memory date.

header.description: Open one memory clue for today, choose the matching saved location, and reveal correctness once both partners are in.
header.title: Who remembers better?

intro.description: Today’s trivia round does not exist yet. Start it from saved memories that have locations.
intro.title: Open the round

round.answerCount: {count, plural, =0 {No answers yet} one {1 answer locked} other {# answers locked}}
round.description: This clue is sourced from one saved memory. Its matching location stays hidden for now.
round.title: Which location was this?

composer.description: Pick one saved location. Editing is not available after submission in this slice.
composer.title: Choose the location

pending.title: Waiting for the second answer
pending.viewerLocked: Your trivia answer is locked. The correct location and both answers stay hidden until your partner submits.

copy.completed: Today’s trivia round is complete and both answers are visible.
copy.not_started: No trivia round is open yet. Start from saved memory locations when you want to begin.
copy.waiting_for_partner: Your answer is in. The reveal opens as soon as your partner answers.
copy.waiting_for_you: Your partner already answered. Choose your location to reveal correctness.

header.description: Gameplay-only daily-question metrics, streaks, and recent round statuses.
header.title: Stats

streak.label: Current streak
streak.value: {count, plural, =0 {0 days} one {# day} other {# days}}

participation.label: Your participation rate
participation.trend: {count, plural, =0 {No answers submitted yet} one {# answer submitted} other {# answers submitted}}

history.description: The latest 14 local days are shown here, including days when no round was started.
history.subtitle: {date}
history.title: Two-week round log

header.description: Set the shared couple timezone here, then jump to the rest of the secondary sections from the same screen.
header.title: Settings and extras

settings.description: This screen now owns the couple timezone. Account, privacy, and per-user preferences still remain downstream.

timezone.description: Choose the single shared timezone that should define local-midnight boundaries across countdowns, future notes, albums, trips, and map views.
timezone.title: Set the couple clock

placeholders.anniversary: An anniversary-worthy page waiting for a little note.
placeholders.compact: A quiet note from this day.
placeholders.featured: One small note can turn this day into a chapter you return to.

countdown.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

header.badge: {count, plural, one {# saved place} other {# saved places}}
header.description: Real stops, trip locations, and memory places now collect into one mapped atlas.
header.title: Places that changed the story

mapFallback.description: The map provider is unavailable, so saved places remain available in the trip list below.
mapFallback.title: Map unavailable

travelAtlas.noteFallback: No place note was added for this stop yet.

side.description: Pick a trip chapter, then move through the real places you saved inside it.
side.title: Browse the atlas by trip

empty.description: Add a memory and this chapter surface will begin to fill with images, dates, and the little details that make your space feel alive.
empty.title: Start your first keepsake

anniversarySpotlight.quoteFallback: A small private world made from ordinary days, soft plans, and moments worth keeping.
anniversarySpotlight.since: Together since {date}. Built from late-night notes, ordinary breakfasts, and the chapters you keep choosing to revisit.

header.description: Browse albums built from real trip-linked memory media.
header.title: Albums

empty.description: Create an album from a trip detail page once that trip has eligible memory media.
empty.title: No albums yet

deferred.description: Albums now sit alongside visited places in the travel model. Coordinates, routes, and provider-backed map tiles remain deferred.
deferred.title: Geographic polish comes later
